descriptions.text: リアルなF1のように、詳細でリアルなマシン設定（エンジン、タイヤ、ボディ）を簡単に楽しむことができます。マシン（チーム）は8種類から選択可能です。日本、イギリス、オーストラリアを含む全16コースでレースを行い、世界チャンピオンを目指す本格的なワールドツアーモードを搭載しています。さらに、お気に入りのコースを選んでレースを楽しむことができるシングルレースモードや、最速ラップを目指すタイムアタックモードも用意されています。もちろん、通信機能を使えば2人で熱いバトルを繰り広げることも可能です。

You can easily enjoy detailed and realistic machine settings (engine, tires, body) like a real F1. Machine (team) can be selected from 8 types. Equipped with a full-scale world tour mode, aiming to become a world champion by racing on all 16 courses around the world, including Japan, England, and Australia. In addition, a single race mode where you can choose your favorite course and enjoy the race, and a time attack mode aiming for the fastest lap are also installed. Of course, the communication function allows two people to fight hotly.

Front Row may refer to:

Front Row (software), media center software for Apple's Mac computers
Front Row (radio programme), a British arts programme broadcast on BBC Radio 4
Front Row (TV program), a Philippine documentary television program broadcast on GMA Network
Front Row Channel, an international digital channel
Front Row (album), a 1982 album by David Meece
"Front Row", an Alanis Morissette song from her 1998 album Supposed Former Infatuation Junkie
The three-player formation at the front of a rugby scrum
